summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI All Country Asia ex Japan ETF (AAXJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC Asia ex JP index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index that holds securities from global markets in Asia, excluding Japan. AAXJ was launched on Aug 13, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

holdings.infoBox: AAXJ is an equity ETF with a total of 957 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 17.60%, Samsung Electronics at 7.45%, SK hynix at 6.39%, Tencent Holdings at 3.38%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 2.23%.
